notes.source: Updated from in-game control settings screenshot captured on 2026-06-26.
notes.mouse_sensitivity: Captured settings: normal fire sensitivity 50, sniper sensitivity 49, unified sensitivity enabled.
notes.focus: Recording/replay assumes the CrossFire game window is focused.
notes.fullscreen: CrossFire opens fullscreen in the current test environment, so use hotkey-armed recording instead of Alt+Tab during a match.
notes.first_mvp: Start recording after manually entering the TDM match. Keep clips short to reduce death/respawn desync.
